.file-embed.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(24, 24, 24) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box
